effect_entries.effect: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.
effect_entries.short_effect: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves.

flavor_text_entries.flavor_text: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.
